descriptionShort: Box score and play-by-play from Richmond Sockeyes vs. Humboldt playoff game with overtime winner.
descriptionLong: Complete detailed box score from a playoff game between the Richmond Sockeyes and Humboldt team on April 23, 1987. Richmond won 4–3 in overtime on a goal by Bobbitt at 1:04 of OT, with assists from McCormick and Czenczek. The game featured seven goals total and extensive penalty minutes across all three periods plus overtime.
